docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIRDUNG, FRED JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
DECLARATION OF BRUCE E KRELL IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIRDUNG, FRED
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF DEC-11-2012 SET ASIDE

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FRED ZIRDUNG'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FROM DEFT AND HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD - DEFENDANT HAS WITHDRAWN THE SUBPOENAS; ACCORDINGLY, THE PLAINTIFF, FRED ZIRDUNG'S, MOTION TO QUASH THE SUBPOENAS HAS BEEN RENDERED MOOT AND WILL BE DENIED. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT, JAKE ANTHONY TAPIA, DID NOT MAKE THE WITHDRAWAL PRIOR TO THE TIME THAT PLAINTIFF FILED HIS MOTION. MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $1,000.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT AND HIS COUNSEL TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PAUL RENNE, JUDGE PRO-TEM, CYNTHIA HERBERT, CLERK, NOT REPORTED =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas And For Protective Order, And Request For Sanctions From Deft And His Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUSSELL A. ROBINSON, TEL. NO. 255-0462 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MELISSA O'CONNOR, TEL. NO. 979-0480 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FRED ZIRDUNG'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas And For Protective Order, And Request For Sanctions From Deft And His Counsel Of Record - DEFENDANT HAS WITHDRAWN THE SUBPOENAS; ACCORDINGLY, THE PLAINTIFF, FRED ZIRDUNG'S, MOTION TO QUASH THE SUBPOENAS HAS BEEN RENDERED MOOT AND WILL BE DENIED. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT, JAKE ANTHONY TAPIA, DID NOT MAKE THE WITHDRAWAL PRIOR TO THE TIME THAT PLAINTIFF FILED HIS MOTION. MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $1,000.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT AND HIS COUNSEL TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Cynthia Herbert, Clerk, Not Reported =302/JPT

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling

MELISSA L. O'CONNOR, ESQ., 415.979.0480, FOR DEFENDANT JAKE ANTHONY TAPIA.

RULING: Argued and the Court VACATED its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT JAKE TAPIA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
